title: ballota hispanica
intro: Ballota hispanica, also known as Spanish lavender, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its fragrant purple flowers and grayish-green leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ballota hispanica include relieving anxiety and insomnia, as well as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and calmness.
